title: #1154: stealth as default instrument + gate legacy behind consent env var
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

Two changes to PR #1154 (branch feat/stealth-js-instrument-v2):
1. STEALTH AS DEFAULT: flip the config so stealth JS instrumentation is the default; legacy js_instrument becomes the gated opt-out. Worker determines the cleanest config-API change (BrowserParams defaults + instrument selection + mutual-exclusion logic).
2. GATE LEGACY behind env var I_AM_KNOWINGLY_DOING_BAD_SCIENCE_BY_RECORDING_NON_REPRESENTATIVE_DATA (=true). If legacy js_instrument is enabled WITHOUT it: logger.error with a link to the paper (Krumnow, Jonker, Karsch arXiv:2205.08890 — legacy is page-detectable, records non-representative data) AND raise ConfigError (hard gate; the env var is a deliberate consent flag). [User to confirm: hard-block vs warn-only; confirm env var spelling.]
Also: docs (Stealth-Instrumentation.md / Configuration.md) + tests for both. Plain English, no AI-tells; GH refs not crosslink in any artifact.
SEQUENCING: must land AFTER verify worker a7c786f3 (detection-collection fix + stealth tests green on FF150) and AFTER #1154 is rebased onto master. Then the-hater pass.
